task.en: In Mail, create a new draft message (do NOT send it) addressed to `pam.beesly@dundermifflin.com`, with the subject exactly `Lunch reimbursement`, and a body that mentions the amount `$100`. Close the draft so it is saved to the Drafts mailbox. Do not send the message and do not create any other drafts.

pre_command: UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.mail',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 1; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to quit' 2>/dev/null; killall Mail 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; EI="$HOME/Library/Mail/V10/MailData/Envelope Index"; sqlite3 "$EI" "DELETE FROM messages WHERE subject IN (SELECT ROWID FROM subjects WHERE subject LIKE '%Lunch reimbursement%');" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$EI" "DELETE FROM subjects WHERE subject LIKE '%Lunch reimbursement%';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$EI" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; find "$HOME/Library/Mail" -path '*Drafts.mbox*' -name '*.emlx' -delete 2>/dev/null; open -gj -a Mail 2>/dev/null; sleep 8;
grading_command: MAIL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get subject of every message of (first mailbox whose name contains "Draft")' 2>/dev/null); echo "$MAIL" | grep -qi 'Lunch reimbursement' && echo True || echo False

MAIL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get address of to recipients of every message of (first mailbox whose name contains "Draft")' 2>/dev/null); echo "$MAIL" | grep -qi 'pam.beesly@dundermifflin.com' && echo True || echo False
MAIL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get content of every message of (first mailbox whose name contains "Draft")' 2>/dev/null); echo "$MAIL" | grep -qi '100' && echo True || echo False

source.note: Re-grounded onto native macOS apps; concept port, not a literal import.
